parsed_output.justification: Mitchell is the most suspicious player due to multiple contradictory role claims. He first claims to be the Robber who robbed Paul (line 89), and then, when prompted by James, he agrees that he is the Troublemaker (line 105), despite the fact that he never previously made that claim. Furthermore, he actively attempts to divert the vote toward Justin (lines 129, 138), which is consistent with a Werewolf's strategy to avoid elimination.
